delegation_capability.evidence_ref: Eleven fresh isolated built-in default review dispatches were attempted. Reviews 1-7, 9, and 10 returned Required findings and each complete findings round received parent remediation plus a different fresh re-review. Review 8 returned no verdict after bounded waits and was interrupted as non-authoritative. Review 11 returned CLEAN.

objective: Create and independently approve the complete planning-only HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup/doctor implementation packet; commit the exact reviewed packet and review/proof evidence first; then close through a separate v1.2 parent record and deterministic ledger without beginning Rust or HCM-2.
work_completed: Validated the exact branch, entry HEAD, clean worktree, HCM-1.1/HCM-1.2/HCM-1.3 dependency ancestry, selected HCM-1.3 closeout, reviewed subject fingerprint, ledger parity, and all three validator modes before editing.

Read live profile/registry/setup/doctor/route-state/author/CLI source and tests, refreshed GitNexus at entry, and recorded required impact including HIGH run_setup and HIGH acquire_authoring_lock surfaces before freezing the packet.

Created the authoritative HCM-1.4 SPEC, dependency-ordered plan, entirely unchecked future implementation todo, and complete immutable planning/review/remediation lineage without changing Rust, Cargo, runtime, product, or definition assets.
Closed nineteen Required findings across Reviews 1-7, 9, and 10; recorded Review 8 as an interrupted non-authoritative attempt; and obtained final CLEAN from Review 11 over the exact 27-file subject.
Committed the exact final reviewed planning subject plus immutable review/proof evidence as 1310e92096f71da1c90ac17b35c66c57519f2e5b. No HCM-1.4 implementation or HCM-2 work began.

Resolved: one-argument helper prescription broke Unix unlock. Parent remediation was re-reviewed by a different fresh reviewer.
